sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْحَمَّالُ يَحْمِلُ الْبَضَائِعَ الثَّقِيلَةَ فِي السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Nosač je nosio tešku robu na tržnici.
sentences.translationEn: The porter used to carry heavy goods in the market.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَعْمَلُ مِنَ الصَّبَاحِ حَتَّى الْمَسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Radio je od jutra do večeri.
sentences.translationEn: He worked from morning until evening.

sentences.translation: Uzimao je svoju naknadu na kraju dana.
sentences.translationEn: He received his payment at the end of the day.

sentences.translation: Hranio je svoju porodicu ovim teškim radom.
sentences.translationEn: He fed his family with this hard work.
